title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 192.139 - Communicable disease reporting, guidelines for department
text:
192.139.  Communicable disease reporting, guidelines for department. — The communicable disease reporting requirements established by the department of health and senior services shall be in accordance with guidelines, funding requirements, or recommendations established by the federal Centers for Disease Control.
(L. 1988 S.B. 602 § 2)
